creator: hotaru@thinkindifferent.net
text:
David Schultz wrote:
> Could you please try this patch?
>   
that seems to work, except that the the two locales that caused it to
crash before only show one character for the last day of the week ("횓혳횕혚
횓혬횓쨉 횓짚횕혖 횓짚횓쨉 횓혻횓쨉 횓혻횓짹 횓짙" for el_GR.UTF-8 and "횖혶횗혧 횖혬횖째 횖혵횗혧 횖혴횗혚 횖혺횘짱 횖혩횖째 횖혩" for
mn_MN.UTF-8)...
